name: Chil-Beer Brisket of Beef Over Wild Rice Amad
recipeInstructions:
1. Place beef brisket, fat side down, in a deep roasting pan.
2. Sprinkle brisket with onion, salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
3. Pour chili sauce over the brisket.
4. Cover tightly and cook in a slow oven (325 degrees F.) for 3 hours.
5. Pour beer over the brisket.
6. Increase oven temperature to moderate (350 degrees F.) and continue cooking, covered, for 30 minutes.
7. Place brisket on a large serving platter and surround with Wild Rice Amadine.
8. Garnish with sliced tomatoes and parsley.
9. Slice brisket very thin and serve with hot cooking liquid.
